  "findings": [
    "Evidence of formwork blowout or severe bulging under hydrostatic pressure",
    "Inadequate bracing or tie spacing failing to meet structural integrity requirements"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop any active concrete placement immediately",
    "Reject the current formwork assembly and require structural engineering review",
    "Reconstruct and re-brace the formwork to meet ACI 347 safety and dimensional tolerances before pouring"
  ],
  "rationale": "The presence of blowout evidence indicates that the formwork and bracing system has failed to contain the lateral pressure of the concrete, violating the structural safety and dimensional tolerance requirements of ACI 347.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 347-04: Guide to Formwork for Concrete",
    "ACI 347R-14: Guide to Formwork for Concrete, Section 2.2 (Design Lateral Pressure) and Section 3.2 (Construction Tolerances)"
  ]
